summary: First-finish smoke pass complete. All backend endpoints and the full E2E flow (homepage, navbar, AI Roast tool, Services hover, Estimator, Before/After, WhatsApp float, scroll-to-top, mobile menu) work as expected. POST /api/roast returns valid JSON with 8 categories and persists; the UI completes the full roast flow end-to-end with score ring + cards visible.
passed: POST /api/roast {url:'stripe.com'} returns 200 in ~36s with integer score (88), non-empty verdict & roast, 8 categories with id/label/icon/headline/advice/severity in [critical|warning|good]
POST /api/leads returns 200 with {id, ok:true}; roast also persists (returns id)
Homepage loads, boot screen disappears, hero shows 'WE DON'T JUST BUILD WEBSITES. WE BUILD RESULTS.'
E2E roast: input → submit → loading state → roast-result with 8 roast-card-* tiles
Estimator 3-step flow shows result with ₹ price range
